overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through grassy hills at dusk. The character travels from open grassland toward a waterfront area with a beached longship and stone ruins, under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with distant forest and watchtower

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through grassy terrain, heading toward the distant forested hills

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the grass
green grass-covered slope rising to the left
green grass-covered slope rising to the right
tall stone structure or ruin atop the distant hill
dense coniferous forest covering the distant hills

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through open grassland at dusk. A stone watchtower stands atop a hill to the left while pine forests cover the distant hills ahead. The sky is overcast with dark grey clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with water views

events.description: terrain shifts from open grassland to coastal cliffside with rocky outcrops on the right
body of water becomes visible on the left side of the path between the hills

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the path as it winds along the cliff edge, with the sea or lake now visible to the left

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with exposed stone and sparse vegetation
calm body of water visible through the gap between hills

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a coastal cliffside with steep rocky outcrops on the right and views of a lake or sea appearing on the left. The terrain becomes more rugged and the forest draws closer ahead.

events.description: beached longship comes into view on the left, marking the approach to a waterfront settlement area
path transitions from dirt to stone paving as scattered debris and ruins become visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches the waterfront area, passing the beached ship and heading toward stone ruins or structures ahead

entered.detail: Norse-style wooden longship with red sail beached on the shore
ancient stone structures and archway marking the path ahead
scattered wooden containers and barrels along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the waterfront where a large beached longship with a red sail rests on the shore to the left. The path becomes paved with stone slabs and scattered wooden crates appear on the right. Ancient stone ruins and an archway lie ahead, marking the entrance to a settlement area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from open, rolling grasslands toward a rugged coastal settlement under a heavy overcast sky. It begins with the character walking along a winding dirt path past a stone watchtower, with distant pine forests looming beneath dark grey clouds. As the path transitions to a cliffside, the terrain becomes more rugged with steep rocky outcrops appearing on the right while the sea opens up to the left. The scene then shifts to the waterfront, where the dirt path gives way to stone slabs and scattered wooden crates. Finally, the camera moves past a large beached longship with a red sail toward ancient stone ruins and an archway marking the entrance to a settlement.
